code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)

[IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController] --> DRAFT : ReportInitiated
note right of DRAFT
  Create report shell:
  • incident/ref IDs bound
  • scope, timeline, owners
  • initial checklist opened
end note

DRAFT --> DATA_GATHER : EvidenceRequested
note right of DATA_GATHER
  Collect evidence:
  • SIEM logs, ledger snapshots
  • config diffs, patches
  • governance directives
end note

DATA_GATHER --> AUTHORING : EvidenceCollected
note right of AUTHORING
  Compile narrative:
  • root cause, impact, fixes
  • timelines & tables
  • redactions planned
end note

AUTHORING --> LEGAL_REVIEW : DraftReady
LEGAL_REVIEW --> ETHICS_REVIEW : LegalCleared
ETHICS_REVIEW --> QA_REVIEW : EthicsCleared
QA_REVIEW --> SIGNING : QAApproved

%% Signing & generation
SIGNING --> GENERATED : ReportGenerated (IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker)
note right of GENERATED
  Immutable bundle produced:
  • hashes, signatures, timestamp
  • public & internal versions
end note

GENERATED --> PUBLISHING : PublishRequested
PUBLISHING --> PUBLISHED : TransparencyReportPublished (IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController)
PUBLISHED --> ARCHIVED : ArchiveScheduled
ARCHIVED --> [IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream]

%% Corrections / amendments
PUBLISHED --> AMEND_REQ : CorrectionRequested
AMEND_REQ --> AUTHORING : AmendmentAuthorized

%% Exceptions / failure paths
DATA_GATHER --> FAILED : MissingEvidence / HashMismatch
AUTHORING --> FAILED : IncompleteNarrative
LEGAL_REVIEW --> FAILED : LegalBlock
ETHICS_REVIEW --> FAILED : EthicsBlock
QA_REVIEW --> FAILED : QAFailed
SIGNING --> FAILED : SignatureError
PUBLISHING --> FAILED : PublishError
FAILED --> [IoT_Industrial_EdgeNode] : ReportAbandoned

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DRAFT,DATA_GATHER,AUTHORING,LEGAL_REVIEW,ETHICS_REVIEW,QA_REVIEW,SIGNING,GENERATED,PUBLISHING,PUBLISHED,ARCHIVED,AMEND_REQ,FAILED core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为工业物联网透明度报告设计一个完整的状态机，从报告创建到最终归档。核心流程要经过数据采集、编写、法务审核、伦理审核、QA审核，最后生成不可篡改的发布版本。另外还要考虑修正流程和异常失败路径。
明白了。我注意到您提到了IoT_Industrial_ActuatorController和IoT_Industrial_MQTT_Broker，这些是触发状态转换的外部系统吗？比如报告创建和最终发布是由ActuatorController触发的？
对，ActuatorController负责发起报告创建和最终发布事件，MQTT Broker在报告生成阶段介入，负责签名和时间戳的不可篡改存储。另外归档后的数据要流入TelemetryStream，失败报告则流转到EdgeNode做废弃处理。
好的，我已经把主流程画出来了：DRAFT通过ReportInitiated进入，然后EvidenceRequested到DATA_GATHER，采集完成后EvidenceCollected进入AUTHORING。每个阶段我都加了注释说明具体产出物，比如数据采集阶段要收集SIEM日志、账本快照这些。
审核链要串联起来：AUTHORING完成后DraftReady进入LEGAL_REVIEW，法务通过后LegalCleared到ETHICS_REVIEW，伦理审核通过EthicsCleared到QA_REVIEW，QA通过QAApproved后进入SIGNING。另外修正流程要从PUBLISHED触发，走AMEND_REQ回到AUTHORING。

修正流程我理解了。关于失败路径，我打算让每个关键阶段都能进入FAILED状态：比如DATA_GATHER遇到MissingEvidence或HashMismatch，AUTHORING遇到IncompleteNarrative，LEGAL_REVIEW和ETHICS_REVIEW分别有LegalBlock和EthicsBlock，QA_REVIEW是QAFailed，SIGNING是SignatureError，PUBLISHING是PublishError。这样覆盖全吗？
完全正确。最后GENERATED阶段要注明产出不可篡改包，包含哈希、签名和时间戳，然后PublishRequested进入PUBLISHING，发布后ArchiveScheduled进入ARCHIVED。所有核心状态用橙色高亮。
完成了。状态机标题设为SM-10.02 — Transparency Report Lifecycle (IoT_Industrial_PLC_Logic)，所有核心状态已经应用core样式填充橙色。从DRAFT到ARCHIVED的主流程、AMEND_REQ修正回路、FAILED异常出口以及三个外部系统接口都清晰标注了。
